# megaport_mcr_ipsec_addon (Resource)

Manages an IPSec tunnel add-on for a Megaport Cloud Router (MCR). This resource allows you to attach, update, and remove IPSec tunnel packs on an existing MCR.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "megaport_mcr_ipsec_addon" "example" {
  mcr_id       = megaport_mcr.example.product_uid
  tunnel_count = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mcr_id` (String) The UID of the MCR to attach the IPSec add-on to.
- `tunnel_count` (Number) The number of IPSec tunnels. Valid values are 10, 20, or 30.

### Read-Only

- `add_on_uid` (String) The UID of the IPSec add-on, assigned by the API.
